description: §14.4/§18.7 — correct-arity construction is clean: `fail MyError.NotFound("x")` binds the sole `id` field (1 arg / 1 field); `let a = MyError.Timeout` names a nullary variant with no payload; `let b = MyError.NotFound("y")` binds `id`. `notCodes` asserts the E-TYPE-082 arity check does NOT false-positive on well-formed construction across the fail, nullary, and payload shapes.
rationale: §14.4: construction that supplies exactly one positional argument per declared payload field (and no payload on a nullary variant) is well-formed and SHALL NOT fire E-TYPE-082.
